input.company_description: B2B field services company specializing in commercial HVAC installation and preventive maintenance contracts. Around 180 employees operating across 6 metro areas. Runs jobs through a legacy ERP and loses 12-15% of scheduled follow-ups due to manual dispatching gaps.

pain_points: losing 12-15% of follow-up revenue from manual dispatch gaps
legacy ERP can't handle multi-metro scheduling complexity
scaling preventive maintenance contracts across 6 metro areas
expected_output.reasoning: SMB field services with quantified revenue leakage from ops inefficiency. Clear pain, known budget range, and a legacy system begging for replacement.
